translations.en: It was a field long ago.
translations.es: Hace mucho tiempo, era un campo.
translations.zh-Hans: 很久以前这里是一片田地。
translations.vi: Ngày xưa đây là một cánh đồng.
translations.ar: كان هذا حقلاً منذ زمن بعيد.
translations.sv: Förr var det här en åker.
translations.ro: Pe vremuri aici era un câmp.
translations.da: Før i tiden var dette en mark.

tokens.explanation: Clitic demonstrative subject pronoun elided before a vowel; subject in a copular clause.
Imperfect 3rd person singular of être used as a copula to link subject and predicate.
Indefinite singular article introducing the noun.
Common noun; predicate nominal after the copula.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘formerly’; sets the time frame for the statement.

translations.en: I think about us, back then.
translations.es: Pienso en nosotros de aquel entonces.
translations.yue: 我會想起嗰陣時嘅我哋。
translations.vi: Tôi nghĩ về chúng ta ngày xưa.
translations.nl: Ik denk aan ons van toen.
translations.hi: मैं उस समय के हम लोगों के बारे में सोचता हूँ.
translations.pl: Myślę o nas z tamtych czasów.
translations.nb: Jeg tenker på oss den gang.
translations.ro: Mă gândesc la noi de atunci.
translations.ja: あの頃の私たちを思い出す。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Present 1st person singular of the lexical verb; main predicate.
Preposition introducing an indirect object/complement.
1st person plural stressed pronoun; object of the preposition à.
Sentence-level temporal adverb meaning ‘in the past’.

sentences.target: On venait jadis ici, tous ensemble.

translations.fr: On venait jadis ici, tous ensemble.
translations.en: We used to come here, all together.
translations.de: Früher kamen wir alle zusammen hierher.
translations.it: Un tempo venivamo qui tutti insieme.
translations.ko: 예전엔 우리 모두 함께 여기 오곤 했다.
translations.zh-Hans: 以前我们常常一起来这里。
translations.yue: 以前我哋會一齊嚟呢度。
translations.ru: Раньше мы все вместе приходили сюда.
translations.he: פעם היינו באים לכאן כולנו יחד.
translations.vi: Ngày xưa chúng tôi thường đến đây cùng nhau.
translations.ar: كنا نأتي إلى هنا جميعًا في السابق.
translations.nl: Vroeger kwamen we hier allemaal sammen.
translations.uk: Раніше ми всі разом приходили сюди.
translations.hi: पहले हम सब मिलकर यहाँ आया करते थे.
translations.nb: Før pleide vi å komme hit alle sammen.
translations.id: Dulu kami biasa datang ke sini bersama-sama.
translations.sv: Förr brukade vi komme hit tillsammans allihop.
translations.ro: Pe vremuri veneam cu toții aici.
translations.cs: Kdysi jsme sem chodili všichni společně.
translations.da: Før plejede vi alle at komme her sammen.
translations.ja: 昔はみんなでここに来ていた.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used colloquially for ‘we’; subject.
Imperfect 3rd person singular of the lexical verb; denotes habitual past action.
Temporal adverb specifying that the action occurred in the past.
Adverb of place indicating location.
Adverbial use emphasizing totality in the expression ‘tous ensemble’.
Adverb meaning ‘together’; manner of the action.

sentences.target: Ce musée montre la ville de jadis.
sentences.reading: /sə my.ze mɔ̃tʁ la vil də ʒa.dis/

translations.fr: Ce musée montre la ville de jadis.
translations.ipa: /sə my.ze mɔ̃tʁ la vil də ʒa.dis/
translations.en: This museum shows the city of yesteryear.
translations.es: Este museo muestra la ciudad de antaño.
translations.de: Dieses Museum zeigt die Stadt von damals.
translations.it: Questo museo mostra la città di un tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这座博物馆展示昔日的城市。
translations.yue: 呢間博物館展示昔日嘅城市。
translations.ru: Этот музей показывает город былых времён.
translations.pt: Este museu mostra a cidade de outrora.
translations.he: המוזיאון הזה מציג את העיר של פעם.
translations.vi: Bảo tàng này cho thấy thành phố ngày xưa.
translations.ar: هذا المتحف يعرض المدينة كما كانت في الماضي.
translations.nl: Dit museum toont de stad van weleer.
translations.uk: Цей музей показує місто минулих часів.
translations.hu: Ez a múzeум a hajdani várost mutatja be.
translations.hi: यह संग्रहालय बीते समय का शहर दिखाता है.
translations.pl: To muzeum pokazuje miasto z dawnych czasów.
translations.el: Αυτό το μουσείο παρουσιάζει την πόλη όπως ήταν παλιά.
translations.nb: Dette museet viser byen fra gamle dager.
translations.id: Museum ini menampilkan kota zaman dulu.
translations.sv: Det här museet visar staden från förr.
translations.ro: Acest muzeu prezintă orașul de altădată.
translations.cs: Toto muzeum ukazuje město z dávných dob.
translations.da: Dette museum viser byen fra gamle dage.
translations.fi: Tämä museo esittelee kaupungin menneiltä ajoilta.
translations.ja: この博物館は昔の街を展示している。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun; head of the subject noun phrase.
Present 3rd person singular of the lexical verb; main predicate.
Definite article introducing the direct object noun.
Common noun; head of the direct object phrase.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement.
Used nominally (‘times of old’) as the complement of de.

ipa: /sə my.ze mɔ̃tʁ la vil də ʒa.dis/

I think about us, back then.

This museum shows the city of yesteryear.
